chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Liability of One Who Carried Something and Claimed Its Loss

parts.text: 3929 - وَ أُتِيَ عَلِيٌّ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ بِصَاحِبِ حَمَّامٍ وُضِعَتْ عِنْدَهُ اَلثِّيَابُ فَضَاعَتْ فَلَمْ يُضَمِّنْهُ وَ قَالَ

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.3929 - Imam Ali ibn Abi Talib (as) was presented with the case of a bathhouse attendant with whom clothes were deposited, but they were lost.
Imam (as) did not hold him liable and said: "He is merely a trustee."
